SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10553553.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dedicated IT Manager well-versed in analyzing and mitigating risk and finding cost-effective solutions. Excels at boosting performance and productivity by establishing realistic goals and enforcing deadlines.
SKILLS: Active Directory, administrative support, Adobe Acrobat, Architect, backup, budget, Client/Server, hardware, Concept, client support, DAS, database, disaster recovery, Ghost, LAN, laptops, Mac hardware, Mac, Exchange, Microsoft Exchange, Microsoft Office, Windows 7, Windows, Microsoft Windows 2003, Windows XP, NEC, Novell, operating systems, PBX, peripherals, Policies, processes, purchasing, servers, SLA, SQL, Symantec, technical support, phones, Video, Vista, web servers, WAN, Windows Server

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 03/2013 to Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed a four-person local IT team, allocating resources to ongoing projects and enforcing deadlines.', 'Drove business KPIs through rapid iteration of customer-facing product features.', 'Leveraged in-depth understanding of end-to-end customer experience to identify pain points and latent customer needs.', 'Collaborated with the global team to resolve IT support cases.', 'Built and maintained a staff of five, terminated one employee for cause.', 'Created and audited processes interlocking with other teams, adjusted as required.', 'Managed travel and budget for staff on-site visits.', 'Owned SaaS customers in North America, Canada, and Australia.', 'Defined project deliverables and monitored task status.', 'Executed proof of concept implementations to validate product feasibility.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: IT Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2011 to 03/2013
DESCRIPTION: ['Designed and delivered mission critical infrastructure to ensure high availability, performance, and security.', 'Maintained security, backup, and redundancy strategies.', 'Managed IT Infrastructure and Client/Server management (Chicago, Houston, Montreal, Sydney).', 'Collected, analyzed, and reported program metrics including product technical performance measures and key performance parameters.', 'Managed North America production data center (SaaS) and disaster recovery applications.', 'Deployed and managed VMware architecture.', 'Monitored and created automatic actions related to hardware and web servers.', 'Engineered IT infrastructure for reliable WAN and LAN connectivity.', 'Configured Active Directory and Group Policy deployment.', 'Provided client support for production.', 'Performed SQL administration.', 'Deployed over 30 NEC phones and supported NEC PBX.', 'Responsible for purchasing and product recommendations.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 02/2010 to 05/2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Tested, configured, and deployed Windows 7 operating system with Acronis Snap Deploy.', 'Deployed and tested Microsoft Exchange 2010 in VMware.', 'Administered SQL 2005 database to run Dentrix and DEXIS software.', 'Configured and implemented Group Policies.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Consultant
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 10/2008 to 05/2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed and provided security administrative support for Paine Wetzel ONCOR International, Northridge Group, Rent Here Realty, and Northwestern Dental Center.', 'Supported Microsoft Windows 2003, XP, Vista, and Mac operating systems.', 'Responsible for purchase decisions to provide the best end-point security solutions.', 'Obtained Milestone Advanced Certified Partner for video surveillance.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 10/2008 to 05/2011
DESCRIPTION: ['Installed and configured LAN with Windows XP and Windows Vista clients.', 'Administered Microsoft Active Directory.', 'Administered Microsoft Exchange 2003 systems including backup and recovery.', 'Deployed Symantec endpoint security solutions and implemented disaster recovery.', 'Managed multiple desktop applications: Microsoft Office, Adobe Acrobat, ACT.', 'Administered intranet.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 10/2008 to 12/2009
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided on-site technical support for Windows 2003 and 2008 servers, workstations, laptops, Blackberries, and iPhones.', 'Migrated to Exchange 2007 SCR from Exchange 2003 with PowerShell and DAS.', 'Managed Windows Server 2008 and Windows 7.']

SOURCE: 10553553.pdf
JOB TITLE: College of Education Computer Technician
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/2006 to 06/2008
DESCRIPTION: ['Performed PC and Mac hardware and software configurations.', 'Troubleshot general Novell Client issues.', 'Installed and maintained peripherals.', 'Built images to be used with Symantec Ghost.']
